title: Miami - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Miami - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Khoury College in Miami
The tech gateway to the Caribbean and South Florida
Khoury College’s Miami campus, located in the city’s Wynwood neighborhood, offers an opportunity to start your career in an area renowned for its eclectic offerings. From museums to an active nightlife, it’s a buzzing spot to be part of the booming tech sector of Miami.
A rising city for your rising career
Miami is full of opportunities for students and companies alike. Watch more and learn from industry partner eMed about the city’s rise.
Programs offered in Miami
Align MS in Computer Science
The Align MS in Computer Science will prepare you to break into tech, without a computer science background.

A booming economy awaits you
Miami’s vibrant economy is booming, and companies need tech talent more than ever — from entrepreneurial tech startups like Kairos, LearnerNation, CareCloud, and Open English, to Fortune 500 companies like AT&T, Lennar, World Fuel Services Corp, and Assurant. Through Northeastern’s experiential learning model, students are prepared to tackle industry’s modern problems with relevant projects from day one. A diverse and international professional landscape fosters a global outlook on the knowledge economy.
Picture yourself at Miami
Located in the heart of Miami.
Contemporary urban campus.
Maria Alonso, regional campus dean and CEO.
Campus reflects vibrant, local community.
Nearby local ocean views and a great spot to unwind.

A rising hub for tech professionals
Students join a robust tech ecosystem at the ground level, as Northeastern builds out one of its newest campuses. With more than 11,500 alumni located in Florida, you’ll tap into a network of Huskies ready to help.
Gorgeous beaches, vibrant cultural events, and year-round warm weather make Miami a top destination for tech talent from around the world. With breweries and art museums steps from campus and a world-famous assortment of street art, there’s something new and interesting to experience every day.
